title: hibiscus sterculiifolius
intro: Hibiscus sterculiifolius, also known as the cotton bush or okra hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Hibiscus sterculiifolius is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
